hero.headline: Secure AI systems for real-world operations
hero.subhead: Maya AI designs and deploys applied intelligence systems that improve workflows, decision-making, and service delivery across enterprise and mission-critical environments. Operating across the United States and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, we build for organizations that need capability, security, and operational impact.

pillars.headline: Six core capability pillars
pillars.subhead: Applied AI capabilities designed for organizations that need secure deployment, operational usefulness, and measurable value.

items.title: AI Agents & Workflow Automation
items.desc: Structured automation for high-value internal workflows, approvals, and service execution with human oversight and audit trails built in from day one.

items.title: Voice & Service Intelligence
items.desc: AI voice agents, contact-center copilots, and multi-channel response systems that handle inbound service operations with consistency and control.

items.title: Spatial & Operational Intelligence
items.desc: Infrastructure monitoring, field operations awareness, and environmental visibility through applied intelligence for asset-linked and distributed environments.

items.title: Knowledge & Document Intelligence
items.desc: Enterprise-grade document retrieval, knowledge management, and multilingual content intelligence for organizations managing large regulated document estates.

items.title: Private AI Deployment
items.desc: Flexible deployment models — cloud, private cloud, on-prem, and hybrid — for organizations requiring strong data control, sovereignty, and integration discipline.

items.title: Custom AI Platforms
items.desc: Purpose-built operator consoles, vertical applications, and private agent platforms tailored to regulated sectors, mission-critical environments, and complex operating contexts.

cta.headline: Start the conversation
cta.subhead: Tell us about your environment, priorities, or the kind of capability you are exploring. Maya will respond with the most relevant next step.

form.title: Request a private briefing
form.disclaimer: All inquiries are handled with appropriate confidentiality.

hero.title: Deployment
hero.subtitle: Deployment built around security, control, and operational fit.
hero.description: Maya structures AI systems around the realities of each environment — including security requirements, data sensitivity, integration boundaries, and operating constraints. Every deployment is sized, scoped, and structured for sustained operational use.

pillars.title: Security by design
pillars.desc: Access control, operational safeguards, and deployment discipline are built in from the start — not added after delivery.

pillars.title: Deployment flexibility
pillars.desc: Cloud, private cloud, on-prem, and hybrid options selected based on the control, compliance, and connectivity needs of your environment.

pillars.title: Operational control
pillars.desc: Human-reviewed workflows, auditability, and traceable execution for every touchpoint that carries governance or sensitivity weight.

items.title: Cloud
items.desc: For speed, scalability, and managed delivery. Hosted on enterprise cloud infrastructure with full encryption in transit and at rest.

items.title: Private Cloud
items.desc: For stronger environmental control and enterprise isolation. Dedicated tenant environments on approved infrastructure providers.

items.title: On-Premises
items.desc: For highly controlled or internally hosted environments requiring in-facility data handling and network isolation.

items.title: Hybrid
items.desc: For organizations balancing flexibility with data governance requirements — splitting workloads across deployment boundaries by sensitivity.

items.title: Role-based access
items.desc: Structured access aligned to teams, responsibilities, and control boundaries with full RBAC enforcement.

items.title: Auditability
items.desc: Traceability across actions, workflows, and system use — every significant event is logged and reviewable.

items.title: Human oversight
items.desc: Human-reviewed execution where operational risk, governance, or sensitivity requires it — no autonomous action in high-stakes contexts.

items.title: Integration-aware delivery
items.desc: Implementation designed around existing systems, enterprise data sources, and the real integration realities of each environment.

steps.label: Assessment
steps.deliverables: Environment review, use-case scoping, security requirements, deployment model selection, integration mapping

steps.label: Pilot
steps.deliverables: Limited-scope deployment, integration validation, user acceptance testing, control verification, refinement

steps.label: Production
steps.deliverables: Full environment deployment, RBAC configuration, audit trail activation, staff enablement, go-live

steps.label: Operate & Evolve
steps.deliverables: Performance monitoring, capability extension, compliance reviews, model updates, quarterly business reviews

items.label: Saudi Arabia
items.value: Regional delivery, implementation alignment, and direct engagement with KSA enterprises, government entities, and regulated sectors.

items.label: United States
items.value: Operating from Virginia with engagement across US enterprise, federal-adjacent, and regulated-industry clients.

items.label: Path to production
items.value: A structured progression from initial assessment through pilot deployment to production and long-term operation.

cta.title: Discuss the right deployment model
cta.subtitle: Connect with Maya to review your environment, security needs, and deployment priorities.

hero.title: Solutions
hero.subtitle: Applied AI for high-value operational workflows.
hero.description: Maya helps organizations apply AI where it creates real operational value — from internal process execution to customer-facing workflows, compliance operations, and decision support environments. Serving regulated enterprises across KSA and US financial services, energy, government-adjacent, and telco.

categories.label: Enterprise Operations
categories.description: AI capabilities that improve execution across internal workflows, coordination, approvals, reporting, and structured business processes at enterprise scale.

items.title: Internal Workflow Automation
items.desc: End-to-end automation of high-volume internal processes — from intake to approval routing to back-office handoff. Designed for enterprise teams managing recurring, rule-bound workflows at scale with full human override capabilities.

items.title: Approvals & Routing Intelligence
items.desc: AI-powered routing and approval acceleration for structured decision chains — contracts, procurement, HR actions, and compliance reviews. Reduces cycle times while preserving audit trails and escalation paths.

items.title: Back-office Orchestration
items.desc: Orchestration layer connecting disparate back-office systems into coherent, automated workflows. Eliminates manual handoffs between ERP, CRM, document stores, and case management tools without replacing existing infrastructure.
items.buyer: IT Operations, Enterprise Architecture, COO office

items.title: Reporting & Ops Intelligence
items.desc: Automated generation of operational reports, performance summaries, and executive briefings from live system data. Structured outputs aligned to leadership review cadences with configurable audience tiers.

categories.label: Customer & Service Workflows
categories.description: Human-supervised AI support for response handling, information access, workflow orchestration, and service operations across enterprise and citizen-facing environments.

items.title: AI Voice Agents
items.desc: Deployable voice AI for inbound service handling, outbound updates, and call triage. Supports Arabic and English with configurable escalation paths, CRM integration, and post-call summaries that feed directly into case workflows.
items.buyer: Customer Operations, Contact Center, Service Excellence

items.title: Contact-center Copilots
items.desc: Real-time agent assistance tools that surface relevant knowledge, suggest responses, and generate post-interaction documentation during live service interactions. Reduces handle time while improving consistency and compliance.

items.title: Citizen & Customer Service Automation
items.desc: End-to-end automation for recurring citizen or customer service journeys — form intake, verification, routing, status updates, and resolution — across web, mobile, and voice channels with full audit capability.

items.title: Multi-channel Response Intelligence
items.desc: Unified response orchestration across email, chat, voice, and portal channels. Maintains context across sessions, enforces response governance policies, and routes to human agents when thresholds or policy triggers are met.

categories.label: Compliance & Risk Operations
categories.description: Applied intelligence for oversight, evidence handling, policy-linked processes, and environments where accountability, audit, and regulated decision support matter.

items.title: Policy-linked Case Handling
items.desc: Case management workflows that enforce policy rules at each step — surfacing relevant regulatory guidance, flagging deviations, and generating structured decision records for audit. Designed for compliance, AML, and risk review teams.

items.title: Evidence & Document Review
items.desc: Automated review of document sets, evidence packages, and structured records against defined compliance criteria. Extracts key data points, flags anomalies, and produces reviewer-ready summaries with source traceability.

items.title: Oversight Dashboards
items.desc: Real-time visibility dashboards for compliance officers and risk leadership — aggregating operational signals, case statuses, policy adherence indicators, and exception queues into a configurable review surface.
items.buyer: Chief Compliance Officer, Risk Leadership, Board Secretariat

items.title: Regulated Decision Support
items.desc: Structured decision-support workflows for high-stakes, human-in-the-loop determinations — credit, licensing, sanctions screening, or permit review. AI surfaces evidence and precedent; the human makes the decision with full traceability.

categories.label: Spatial & Field Intelligence
categories.description: Applied intelligence for environments where infrastructure, assets, geography, and distributed field operations require persistent visibility and rapid response.

items.title: Infrastructure Visibility
items.desc: Continuous monitoring of physical infrastructure — utilities, networks, pipelines, and built assets — using imagery, sensor feeds, and operational data. Detects anomalies, generates alerts, and feeds field dispatch workflows.

items.title: Field-operations Intelligence
items.desc: Operational awareness for distributed field teams — combining location signals, work orders, and real-time status to optimize dispatch, track task completion, and surface issues before they escalate.

items.title: Asset & Environmental Monitoring
items.desc: Monitoring of physical assets and environmental conditions across large-area sites using satellite imagery, drone feeds, and ground sensors. Delivers structured change-detection outputs aligned to maintenance and safety workflows.

items.title: Distributed Asset Analytics
items.desc: Aggregated performance analytics across distributed physical asset portfolios — identifying underperformance patterns, maintenance risk clusters, and investment prioritization signals from multi-source operational data.
items.buyer: Asset Owners, Portfolio Management, Engineering Leadership

categories.label: Knowledge & Document Intelligence
categories.description: Enterprise-grade document retrieval, knowledge management, and multilingual content intelligence for organizations managing large, regulated document and knowledge estates.

items.title: Document Intelligence
items.desc: Structured extraction, classification, and analysis of complex enterprise documents — contracts, reports, technical manuals, regulatory filings, and correspondence — at scale with provenance tracking and confidence scoring.

items.title: Knowledge Retrieval Systems
items.desc: Private, role-gated knowledge retrieval systems that surface accurate, source-traced answers from internal document estates. Deployed on private infrastructure — no data leaves the organization's control perimeter.
items.buyer: Operations Teams, Policy Staff, Technical Support

items.title: Content Operationalization
items.desc: Transforms unstructured content repositories — SharePoint estates, legacy databases, policy archives — into queryable, governed knowledge assets. Includes ingestion pipelines, permission mapping, and ongoing synchronization.

items.title: Multilingual Content Intelligence
items.desc: Cross-language document analysis, translation, and knowledge extraction optimized for Arabic-English enterprise environments. Handles formal Arabic, mixed-language documents, and technical terminology without loss of regulatory nuance.

categories.label: Custom Platforms & Applications
categories.description: Purpose-built AI platforms, operator consoles, and vertical applications designed for regulated sectors, mission-critical environments, and complex operating contexts where off-the-shelf tools cannot meet requirements.

items.title: Custom AI Platforms
items.desc: Fully bespoke AI platforms engineered around a client's specific operational context, data architecture, compliance requirements, and user workflows. Delivered as a complete, production-grade system — not a prototype.
items.buyer: CTO, Chief Digital Officer, Program Leadership

items.title: Operator Consoles
items.desc: Configurable command-and-review interfaces for operations teams, compliance officers, and field managers. Surfaces AI outputs, flags requiring review, case queues, and workflow statuses in a single governed pane.

items.title: Private Agent Platforms
items.desc: Deployable multi-agent orchestration environments hosted entirely within the client's infrastructure perimeter. Enables complex, multi-step AI workflows with full audit logging, policy enforcement, and human review gates.

items.title: Purpose-built Vertical Applications
items.desc: Sector-specific AI applications engineered to the regulatory, workflow, and integration constraints of a defined vertical — government permitting, financial surveillance, energy dispatch, or telco operations. Delivered under a structured co-development model.
items.buyer: Ministry/Agency Leadership, Sector CTOs, Program Owners

entryPaths.label: Government & Ministry Engagements

entryPaths.label: Enterprise Procurement
entryPaths.desc: For enterprise procurement, sourcing, and RFP engagement. Named BD contacts available on request.

hero.title: Company
hero.subtitle: A focused AI company operating across the United States and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
hero.description: Maya AI builds applied intelligence systems for organizations that need secure deployment, practical execution, and measurable operational value. We operate through Maya AI, Inc. (Delaware-incorporated, Virginia HQ) in the United States, and Maya AI KSA (Saudi-registered, Riyadh) in the Kingdom.
proofs: Applied AI for enterprise and government
Operating in KSA and the United States

whoWeAre.title: About Maya
whoWeAre.content: Maya was built around a simple principle: AI should improve real operations, not just generate interest. Our work focuses on applied systems that support execution, intelligence, and control across enterprise and mission-critical environments. We design for deployment — not demonstration — and measure success by operational impact, not feature count.

identity.title: How we operate
identity.content: We combine cross-market perspective with practical delivery discipline. Our work is shaped around secure implementation, operational usefulness, and long-term fit inside real environments. We bring the same delivery standard to every engagement regardless of market or sector.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.content: To turn AI into a trusted operational capability through systems that are useful, controlled, and built for deployment in serious environments. We believe the right measure of AI is whether it changes how work gets done — not whether it generates impressive outputs in isolation.

vision.title: Our focus
vision.content: We focus on applied AI delivery for organizations that need security, practicality, and measurable value rather than broad experimentation. Serving regulated enterprises across KSA and US financial services, energy, government-adjacent, and telco — with the same commitment to operational discipline in both markets.

differentiators.title: Why Maya
differentiators.subtitle: Our model is designed for organizations that need more than general-purpose AI — they need secure, deployable, and operationally useful systems delivered by a team that understands regulated environments.

items.title: Operational usefulness
items.desc: We focus on AI that fits real workflows and creates day-to-day operational value. Every system we deliver is designed around how people actually work, which means faster time-to-value and higher adoption.

items.title: Secure deployment
items.desc: Deployment models aligned to control, security, and enterprise realities. We design for on-prem, private cloud, and hybrid environments as first-class options and map every deployment to relevant compliance requirements.

items.title: Human-controlled execution
items.desc: Automation where it helps, oversight where it matters. Maya systems include configurable human review gates, escalation paths, and audit trails as standard — giving operations teams the control they need.

items.title: Cross-market perspective
items.desc: Operating across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the United States with a unified delivery model and shared compliance spine. We understand both markets' regulatory environments and procurement realities.

operatingModel.title: Operating presence
operatingModel.content: Maya serves organizations across Saudi Arabia and the United States through a unified model focused on applied AI delivery, secure implementation, and long-term operational value.

items.label: Saudi Arabia
items.value: Maya AI KSA operates from Riyadh, serving government entities, regulated enterprises, and mission-critical environments across the Kingdom. Aligned to PDPL, NCA ECC, and SDAIA guidance.

items.label: United States
items.value: Maya AI, Inc. operates from Virginia, serving federal-adjacent, enterprise, and regulated-industry clients across the United States. Aligned to NIST 800-53 and SOC2 Type II (in progress).

items.label: Delivery approach
items.value: Understand the environment, define the right use case, select the deployment model, build for sustained operational use. Our delivery model includes ongoing operational partnership.

items.title: Practicality
items.desc: We care about systems that work in real operational settings — not systems that perform well in demos. Every design decision is tested against the question: will this hold up in production?

items.title: Control
items.desc: Security, access, and oversight are part of the design, not an afterthought. We build RBAC, audit logging, and human review into the system architecture from the start.

items.title: Reliability
items.desc: We build for sustained use, not short-lived demos. Our delivery model includes operational monitoring, capability extension, and long-term partnership as standard components.

items.title: Discipline
items.desc: Clear scope, thoughtful deployment, and serious execution. We engage only where we can be genuinely useful — and we hold ourselves to the same operational discipline we ask of our clients.

hero.title: The people behind Maya
hero.subtitle: Practitioners who have operated at the intersection of AI, enterprise delivery, and regulated environments across the United States and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

leadership.placeholder: Leadership profiles are being finalized for public release. Contact us for a direct introduction.

leaders.name: Chief Executive Officer
leaders.title: CEO
leaders.bio: Maya's Chief Executive brings two decades of experience building and scaling technology-driven operations across regulated markets. Prior career spans enterprise software delivery, government digital transformation, and cross-border operating strategy in the US and GCC.

leaders.name: Chief Technology Officer
leaders.title: CTO
leaders.bio: Responsible for Maya's technical architecture, AI platform strategy, and sovereign deployment engineering. Deep background in applied ML, enterprise systems integration, and secure-by-design infrastructure across regulated environments.

leaders.name: Chief Delivery Officer
leaders.title: CDO
leaders.bio: Leads delivery across all Maya engagements — from assessment through production deployment and ongoing operations. Previous experience delivering mission-critical technology programs in financial services, energy, and government sectors.

leaders.name: KSA Country Lead
leaders.title: Country Lead, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
leaders.bio: Heads Maya's in-Kingdom operations from Riyadh. Extensive experience building enterprise technology relationships within KSA's government and regulated private sector, with deep understanding of Vision 2030 priorities and SDAIA-aligned AI frameworks.

leaders.name: Head of Government Affairs
leaders.title: Head of Government Affairs
leaders.bio: Manages Maya's government and regulatory engagement in both markets. Prior background in public sector technology policy, procurement strategy, and regulatory frameworks translated into operational AI governance requirements.

leaders.name: Head of Security
leaders.title: Head of Security & Compliance
leaders.bio: Responsible for Maya's security architecture, compliance posture, and sovereign deployment standards. Background in enterprise cybersecurity, regulatory mapping (NIST, NCA ECC, PDPL), and secure-by-default AI system architectures.

advisors.name: Senior Advisor — AI Strategy
advisors.desc: Advisory focus on enterprise AI strategy, responsible AI frameworks, and cross-market commercialization.

advisors.name: Senior Advisor — Sovereign Technology
advisors.desc: Advisory focus on sovereign AI infrastructure, in-Kingdom technology policy, and government engagement in the GCC.

advisors.name: Senior Advisor — Regulated Industries
advisors.desc: Advisory focus on AI deployment in financial services, energy, and government-adjacent sectors across the US and MENA.

hero.title: Security, compliance, and sovereign readiness
hero.subtitle: Maya is designed from first principles for deployment in environments where security, data sovereignty, and regulatory alignment are operational requirements. Our compliance posture spans both KSA and US regulatory regimes, with the same control architecture applied to both markets.

complianceMatrix.title: Compliance control mapping
complianceMatrix.intro: Maya maps its control architecture against the major regulatory frameworks applicable to its operating markets.

dataResidency.title: Data residency & sovereignty
dataResidency.content: Maya supports multiple data residency configurations aligned to the sovereignty requirements of each deployment. In-Kingdom deployments can be hosted entirely within KSA infrastructure with no data crossing sovereign boundaries. US deployments support AWS GovCloud intent and US-only configurations. Hybrid deployments allow organizations to split workloads by data classification.

options.label: In-Kingdom (KSA)
options.desc: Full data residency within Saudi Arabia. Aligned to PDPL and NCA data localisation guidance.

options.label: US Regional
options.desc: US-only infrastructure. AWS GovCloud alignment in progress. Suitable for federal-adjacent deployments.

options.label: Hybrid / Split
options.desc: Sensitive data in designated residency zone. Non-sensitive processing on preferred cloud.

options.label: On-Premises
options.desc: Full client infrastructure deployment. No cloud dependency. Maximum sovereignty and air-gap capability.

subprocessors.title: Infrastructure & platform partners
subprocessors.intro: Maya integrates with industry-standard enterprise platforms. Partner-tier designations and co-sell arrangements are confirmed on request.

partners.name: AWS
partners.role: Primary cloud infrastructure. GovCloud alignment in progress.

partners.name: Microsoft Azure
partners.role: Enterprise cloud and AI platform integration.

contact.title: Security contact
contact.content: For security disclosures, vulnerability reports, or coordinated disclosure requests, contact security@mayaai.net or security@mayaai.sa. Maya operates a responsible disclosure process — reports are acknowledged within 48 hours.

hero.title: Join Maya
hero.subtitle: We are building AI systems that matter — in environments where the stakes are real.

careers.intro: We are hiring across engineering, delivery, and go-to-market in Riyadh and Virginia. We work in small, focused teams where every person contributes to outcomes that are visible and meaningful.

roles.title: Senior AI Engineer
roles.desc: Build and deploy production AI systems across enterprise workflows, voice, and document intelligence — with a strong bias toward operational reliability and security-first architecture.

roles.title: Enterprise Delivery Lead
roles.desc: Own the delivery lifecycle for complex enterprise and government engagements — from assessment and scoping through production deployment and operational handoff.

roles.title: AI Solutions Architect
roles.desc: Design the technical solution architecture for Maya's enterprise and government clients — translating requirements into secure, scalable AI system designs across our six capability domains.

hero.title: Insights
hero.subtitle: Thinking on sovereign AI, enterprise deployment, and the realities of operating AI systems in regulated environments.

articles.title: What sovereign AI really means in the Kingdom
articles.excerpt: As Saudi Arabia accelerates its AI National Strategy, the meaning of 'sovereign AI' has moved from a policy aspiration to a procurement requirement. This piece explores what in-Kingdom data residency, SDAIA-aligned architecture, and NCA ECC compliance actually demand from AI system vendors.

articles.title: Deploying agent workflows in regulated US environments
articles.excerpt: Autonomous AI agents present a governance challenge that most enterprise frameworks weren't designed for. Drawing on deployments in financial services and government-adjacent environments, this piece examines the control architectures, audit requirements, and human-in-the-loop patterns that make agent workflows viable.

articles.title: Reference architecture for in-Kingdom data residency
articles.excerpt: Building AI systems that keep all data within the Kingdom requires more than selecting a KSA-hosted cloud provider. This piece lays out the architectural decisions that determine whether a system genuinely meets KSA data localisation requirements.
